repo.name: nihaltp
repo.description: This is a repository of apps made by nihaltp. Feel free to try them out!

apps.description: A simple LAN chat app built using Flutter. It allows users to chat with each other over a local network without the need for an internet connection. The app uses UDP sockets for communication and supports text messaging.

en-US.description:
Secret Chat is a local area network (LAN) messaging application that allows you to chat with friends and colleagues without an internet connection. Perfect for conferences, offices, events, or any situation where you need secure, private communication within a local network.

Features:
â€¢ No Internet Required - Chat over your local WiFi or mobile hotspot
â€¢ Privacy Focused - Messages stay on your local network
â€¢ Multiple Security Options - Protect your rooms with passwords, PINs, or pattern locks
â€¢ Dark Theme - Easy on the eyes with built-in dark mode
â€¢ App Lock - Biometric or screen lock protection for the entire app
â€¢ Hidden Rooms - Create private rooms that don't appear in the room list
â€¢ Message History - Messages persist while the app is running, cleared when closed
â€¢ Material Design 3 - Modern, clean interface

How to Use:
1. Choose "Host Network" to create a room and share as the host
2. Or choose "Use Wi-Fi" to browse and join existing rooms
3. Optionally protect your room with a password, PIN, or pattern
4. Start chatting - all communication stays within your local network

Security:
- All communication happens locally on your WiFi network
- No data transmitted to external servers
- Messages are not stored permanently
- Supports biometric authentication
- Pattern lock option for additional security

Perfect for:
â€¢ Office communications and quick collaboration
â€¢ Conferences and events
â€¢ Classroom discussions
â€¢ LAN parties and gaming events
â€¢ Emergency communication when internet is unavailable
â€¢ Privacy-conscious users who want local control
en-US.name: Secret Chat
en-US.summary: LAN chat without internet - secure, private, instant messages
en-US.whatsNew:
v1.2.1 - Padding Compatibility & Test Reliability
â€¢ Fixed message delivery between devices with different message padding settings (chunk size mismatch).
â€¢ Added cross-device tests for mismatched padding in both user and room chat.
â€¢ Improved failover test reliability (host readiness wait).
â€¢ All tests and analyzer clean for release.

apps.description: A simple volume lock app built using Flutter. It allows users to lock their device's volume level and prevent accidental changes.

en-US.description:
Volume Lock gives you fine-grained control over your Android audio behavior with two core features:

- Volume Lock: when the screen turns off, current media, ring, notification, and alarm volumes are locked and automatically restored if changed.
- App Volume Lock: saves and restores media volume for selected apps when you return to them.

Key highlights:
- Tracks and restores audio levels automatically
- Lets you choose which apps participate in App Volume Lock
- Keeps behavior consistent after reboot

Permissions:
- Do Not Disturb / Notification Policy access is needed to lock ring and notification volumes on Android 6+
- Accessibility service is needed to detect foreground app changes for App Volume Lock

Built with Flutter
en-US.name: Volume Lock
en-US.summary: Lock device volume profiles and auto-restore per-app media volume.
en-US.whatsNew: Show all app icon/logo in app list. Fix bug for adaptive icon. Fallback to letter if icon missing. Many grunt.
